name: Paracetamol
description: Used to treat pain and fever.

name: Ibuprofen
description: Used for treating pain, fever, and inflammation.

name: Amoxicillin
description: Used to treat a wide variety of bacterial infections.

name: Aspirin
description: Used to reduce pain, fever, or inflammation.

name: Omeprazole
description: Used to treat gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD) and other conditions caused by excess stomach acid.

name: Metformin
description: First-line medication for the treatment of type 2 diabetes.

name: Atorvastatin
description: Used to prevent cardiovascular disease in those at high risk and treat abnormal lipid levels.

name: Amlodipine
description: Used to treat high blood pressure and coronary artery disease.

name: Salbutamol
description: Used for the relief of bronchospasm in conditions such as asthma and chronic obstructive pulmonary disease.

name: Diazepam
description: Used to treat a range of conditions, including anxiety, seizures, alcohol withdrawal syndrome, and muscle spasms.
